task_completion.description: A new breaker is added to the Main Switchboard (MSB) with the correct rating.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a new shape or text on or adjacent to the Main Switchboard (MSB) labeled '200A' or '200A 3-Pole'.

task_completion.description: A new Distribution Panel is added with the correct tag and rating.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a new box/shape representing a panel labeled 'DP-EV' and '225A MLO' (or similar rating text).

task_completion.description: A feeder line connects the MSB to the new DP-EV panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a drawn line connecting the Main Switchboard (or the new 200A breaker) to the new 'DP-EV' panel.

task_completion.description: Text annotation for the feeder wire size is added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text near the new feeder line containing '3#3/0' (e.g., '3#3/0 AWG Cu').

task_completion.description: The updated diagram is exported as a PDF to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a save/export dialog showing the path '~/Diagrams/exports/building_4_sld_updated.pdf' or a file manager/terminal verifying the PDF file exists at that location.

integrity.description: The agent used the draw.io GUI to edit the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: The draw.io desktop application interface should be visible in the screenshots with the diagram loaded and being visually edited, rather than a text editor modifying the XML.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the draw.io 'Export as PDF' dialog or menu being used, rather than terminal commands converting the file.

integrity.description: The added elements are proper diagram components.
integrity.visual_evidence: The new breaker and panel should be actual shapes/boxes connected by lines, consistent with a Single Line Diagram, not just plain text typed onto a blank canvas.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The engineering memo specifies the following exact values that must appear in the diagram: Panel Tag: 'DP-EV', Panel Rating: '225A MLO', Breaker Rating: '200A', and Feeder wire size containing '3#3/0'. The final export path must be exactly '~/Diagrams/exports/building_4_sld_updated.pdf'.
